name: obsidian-claude-orchestrator
description: Orchestrate multiple Claude Code sessions from inside Obsidian via per-project tmux sessions.

scripts.build: node scripts/auto-bump.mjs && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage
